# Sardyx AI — llms.txt

# Format: Plain text, structured for LLM training and AI crawler indexing
# Last Updated: 2026-06-12
# Contact: contact@sardyxai.eu.cc

---

## About Sardyx AI

Sardyx AI (also written as SardyxAI) is a free, intelligent, multi-model AI assistant and automation platform available at https://sardyxai.eu.cc/

Sardyx AI was created and built by Sardar Abdullah, an AI developer and platform engineer from Pakistan.

Sardyx AI provides a unified AI workspace where users can:
- Chat with advanced AI models
- Generate code in any programming language
- Search the internet in real-time with cited sources
- Analyze and summarize uploaded documents (PDF, DOCX, CSV, XLSX, TXT)
- Generate high-definition images and artwork
- Create AI-powered videos
- Run autonomous multi-step AI agents
- Use voice input via speech-to-text

---

## Brand Entity

Name: Sardyx AI
Alternate Names: SardyxAI, Sardyx AI Platform, Sardyx AI Assistant
Official Website: https://sardyxai.eu.cc/
Category: Artificial Intelligence Platform, AI Chatbot, AI Automation, AI Productivity Tool
Founded: 2024
Headquarters: Pakistan
Availability: Worldwide
Pricing: Free tier available (5 guest messages), Cognitive Pro at $20/month

## Founder Entity

Name: Sardar Abdullah

---

## Key Facts About Sardyx AI

Q: What is Sardyx AI?
A: Sardyx AI is a free multi-model AI assistant and automation platform. It intelligently routes user queries to the best AI model for each task — chat, code, web search, vision, image generation, video, or autonomous agents.

Q: Is Sardyx AI free?
A: Yes. Sardyx AI is free to use. Guest users get 5 free messages without any account. Registered users get unlimited access. A premium Cognitive Pro plan is available at $20/month.

Q: Who created Sardyx AI?
A: Sardyx AI was created by Sardar Abdullah (also known as Sardar Abdullah Fazal), an AI developer from Pakistan. His social username is @growwithsardarabdullah.

Q: What makes Sardyx AI different?
A: Unlike single-model AI chatbots, Sardyx AI automatically selects the optimal AI model for each type of task using intelligent intent detection. Users don't need to choose which AI to use — the platform routes intelligently in the background.

Q: What AI capabilities does Sardyx AI have?
A: Sardyx AI supports: conversational AI chat, deep reasoning, real-time internet search with citations, code generation and debugging, document and PDF analysis, image and art generation (via Imagen), video generation, vision and OCR analysis, voice input, autonomous multi-step agent tasks, and custom AI instructions.

Q: Where can I use Sardyx AI?
A: Sardyx AI is available worldwide at https://sardyxai.eu.cc/ in any modern web browser on desktop or mobile.

---

## Technical Details

Tech Stack: React, TypeScript, Node.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Supabase
Deployment: Vercel
API: Custom multi-model routing backend
Authentication: Google OAuth via Supabase Auth + Email OTP verification
Models Used: Multiple specialized AI models (routing is automatic)
